country_data.description: WHO GHO health indicator values by country and year

country_code.description: ISO 3-letter country code (RWA, KEN, UGA, ETH, TZA)

value.description: Indicator value — may be NULL for some country/year combinations

sex.description: Sex disaggregation: BTSX (both sexes), MLE (male), FMLE (female). Use BTSX for summary charts.

low_estimate.description: Lower bound of confidence interval — often NULL even when value is present

high_estimate.description: Upper bound of confidence interval — often NULL even when value is present

countries.description: Country reference table — one row per target country

indicators.description: Indicator reference table — one row per WHO GHO indicator loaded

indicator_code.description: WHO GHO indicator code — primary key

allowed_joins.description: Join health indicator values to country names
Join health indicator values to indicator metadata

business_context: WHO Global Health Observatory data for 5 core markets in East Africa: Rwanda, Kenya, Uganda, Ethiopia, Tanzania. Covers reproductive health, maternal health, and child health indicators. Data is cross-sectional by year — not all indicators have data for every country/year combination. Always filter WHERE value IS NOT NULL.
not_answerable: Drug pricing, procurement costs, or supply chain data
Country-specific clinical protocols or treatment guidelines
Forecasts or projections beyond available data years
Questions requiring data from countries outside RWA, KEN, UGA, ETH, TZA
Causal attribution or explanation of why a metric changed
Staffing levels, healthcare worker counts, or facility capacity
